name: Unhandled promise rejection in setTimeout callback
description: A new fetchUserData function launches an async callback inside setTimeout without try/catch. If the inner await rejects, the rejection is unhandled — silently swallowed in older Node or crashing the process in Node >= 15.

expected_findings.description: fetchUserData passes an async arrow function to setTimeout without try/catch. Rejections from fetchRemote or db.cacheUser are unhandled and will cause an UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning or process crash.

expected_clean.description: Pure formatting utilities with no async code or error paths
